title: crotalaria ebenoides
intro: Crotalaria ebenoides, also known as the East Indian rattlebox, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and seed pods that rattle when dry. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria ebenoides are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
